import client from'./client';// Meals
export const getMeals=()=>client.get('/meals/');export const getMealById=id=>client.get("/meals/".concat(id,"/"));// Plans
export const getPlans=()=>client.get('/plans/');export const getPlanById=id=>client.get("/plans/".concat(id,"/"));// Reviews
export const getReviews=()=>client.get('/reviews/');export const createReview=data=>client.post('/reviews/',data);// Orders
export const createOrder=data=>client.post('/orders/',data);export const getOrders=()=>client.get('/orders/');export const getOrderById=id=>client.get("/orders/".concat(id,"/"));// Contact
export const submitContactForm=data=>client.post('/contact/',data);
